stemHtml: On a significant weather chart, we see the following for the area where a VFR-flight will take place: BKN CU SC 100 023 If the flight is planned at FL 85, we can estimate that

options.a: we will fly just below the cloud base where the cloud cover is between 5 and 7 oktas.
options.b: we will probably have to divert around some cumulus tops.
options.c: we will be in solid clouds and consequently a VFR flight is not possible.
options.d: we will fly above a solid cloud cover.
